lines.speaker: Drogo dwarf
lines.text: 'Ello, welcome to my Mining shop, friend!

lines.speaker: Drogo dwarf
lines.text: I may be short, but at least I've got manners.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why don't you ever restock ores and bars?

lines.speaker: Drogo dwarf
lines.text: The only ores and bars I sell are those sold to me.
